paragraphs.body: I’m sitting on my bed, with my knees tucked to my chest crying. I’m ready to give up on the world, without feeling like I have a purpose. I continue to ask God when things will get better, when will my worries go away, and when will I have a peaceful live. The answer to that is you will never know when the right time will be, you can only hope and have faith that things will get better.

annotations.comment: Great job starting in scene! Nice.
annotations.context_left: I’m sitting on my bed, with my knees tucked to my chest crying. I’m ready to give up on

paragraphs.body: Personally, when I was struggling the most in my life, God would send me someone to keep me going. My “home” language is one of the reasons I am who I am today. My family, which is different from a regular family, concludes of my uncle and his wife, my grandmother, and my boyfriend and his family. However, I do have other distance family that I love, and I speak to here and there, but I am not as close to them. These specific people in life have guided me through so much in so many different ways.

annotations.text: My “home” language is one of the reasons I am who I am today.

paragraphs.body: To listen means to Take in every piece of knowledge given to you Realizing what one’s advice can do for you Allowing the right people to influence you One thing that my Mimi, my grandmother, always said is “Everything happens for a reason.” This saying may not mean much to other’s but to me it means the world. This saying has helped me through my darkest days. My Mimi is my biggest inspiration. She has given me so many little sayings that I still hold close to my heart to this day, and always will forever. My Mimi has stepped up when my parents chose not to be around, making her more than just a grandmother, but a role model. Since I have struggled with my parents, God sent me Mimi. Whenever I am going through a difficult time, she reminds me that everything happens for a reason and God has a plan for me so I must trust him and not worry about the things out of my control. She makes sure that I am always taken care of and gives me wisdom even when I may not think I need it, but I really do. Mimi guides me through every path or challenge I may face. When I hear my Mimi’s voice, I as if I’m home.

annotations.text: “Everything happens for a reason.” This saying may not mean much to other’s but to me it means the world. This saying has helped me through my darkest days.

paragraphs.body: To have someone that cares means to Feel loved, and content with who you are Know you are worth being around Understand you are yourself for a reason My uncle Mike and his wife mean so much to me. They go out of their way to take me out to dinners, have a girls’ day, and be just a phone call away. Throughout the years he has made sure to always give me a call to just check in even when I wasn’t as close with him. Those little checkups mean the world to me My uncle, who is an amazing person, makes sure that I always have everything I need. My uncle genuinely enjoys being there for me and spending time with me, which makes me feel whole. He reassures me that he is always around whenever I need him. He lives very close to Pittsburgh, so he comes and picks me up for dinner anytime I want. He has helped me so much, especially since he is my father’s brother, he knows it all and goes out of his way to step and fill the shoes that are empty. Even though it is not his responsibility, he goes out of his way to make me feel loved.

annotations.text: My uncle Mike and his wife mean so much to me. They go out of their way to take me out to dinners, have a girls’ day, and be just a phone call away.

paragraphs.body: To trust means knowing to Accept who God has sent into your life My boyfriend, Jason, who is one of my biggest blessings, has showed me what it feels like to be loved for who I am, he doesn’t have to love me, but he chooses to. It feels as if I’ve known him forever. He has been there for me through every obstacle I may face, and he reassures that he will always be there for me. He not only does the bare minimum, but he goes above and beyond to do everything for me. If I need a hug, he will drive to wherever I am to give me one, if I’m hungry he will go out if his way to bring me my favorite food, when I’m having a bad day he brings me my favorite candy with flowers, and when I breakdown and cry, he cries with me. It took a lot to be able to let him into my life and experience it with me, and I thank God that I did. I am not only so grateful for him coming into my life, but also his family. His parents have brought me into their home and love me as if I’m their own child. They invite me over even if Jason is not around, and they are a part of my family. My Mimi always says that she believes that God sent them into my life as a blessing. When I am with Jason, I feel safe, and loved, and myself.

paragraphs.body: God has a plan for every one of our life’s and knows what will help us. Personally, for me these people in my life make me feel at home, and love me for who I am. They not only make me feel loved but also appreciated and I don’t know what I would do without them. These very special people are my gifts from God. So, my “home” language may not just be words, but it’s the way my family expresses out love for each other through all different forms. So remember, the next time you’re sitting in your bed crying and losing hope, say a prayer, ask God to give you someone or something that makes you for complete, God’s timing is just right, not too early, not too late, just right. Everything happens for a reason.
